policy_name: Ramirez Auto Body - Expense Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.requirement: Any single expense at or above $300
validation_rules.notes: Per shop policy - John signs off on spend >= $300
Only one valid receipt allowed per expense
Reconcile against Keystone / PPG / Axalta invoices

context: Rules used when Rosa validates technician/manager shop-expense receipts across the Market Street, Broadway, and Totowa locations.
